overview: I built the information architecture for a buying group personalization advisor: a canonical data model covering 5 roles, 20 signals, decay windows, confidence tiers, and consent gates, plus a 9-document corpus structured for both human practitioners and AI retrieval.

keyPoints.title: Data model spans 7 entities across one decision chain
9 documents split operational vs. specification for dual audiences
Spec-only model enables single-source governance over runtime
Distributed definitions fragment retrieval — centralize every concept
Privacy earns its own document for legal and InfoSec review
